columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous
columns.extraction_plan: The results are reported for patients with synchronous metastases. This is indicated in the text on page 4, section 3.1 "Overall survival", which states: "In patients with metastases at diagnosis, median OS was 11.1 mo longer in the ADT plus D arm compared with the ADT arm, without a statistically significant difference, at 52.6 mo (95% CI, 43.3-66.8) versus 41.5 mo (95% CI, 36.3–54.5) (HR: 0.93 [95% CI, 0.69-1.25]; p = 0.6)." Table 1 on page 3 also includes a row for "Metastases at diagnosis, n (%)".
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous
columns.extraction_plan: The results are reported for patients with metachronous disease. This is indicated in the text on page 4, section 3.1 "Overall survival", which states: "For patients with metastases after failure of local treatment, median OS was not reached (95% CI, 69.5–NR) in the ADT plus D arm and was 69.8 mo (95% CI, 62.2-NR) in the ADT arm (HR: 0.83 [95% CI, 0.47-1.47]; p = 0.5) (Supplementary Table 2)." Table 1 on page 3 also includes a row for "Metastases after treatment for local disease, n (%)".
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume
columns.extraction_plan: The results are reported for patients with high volume disease (HVD). This is indicated in the Abstract on page 1, which states: "Median OS in ADT plus D and ADT arms, respectively, was for HVD patients: 39.8 mo (95% CI, 28.0–53.4) versus 35.1 mo (95% CI, 29.9–43.6) (HR: 0.78 [95% CI, 0.56–1.09]; p = 0.14)". Table 2 on page 4 provides "Survival data... by treatment arm and metastatic burden" including a column for "HVD". Table 1 on page 3 also includes a row for "High-volume disease (%)".
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
columns.extraction_plan: The results are reported for patients with low volume disease (LVD). This is indicated in the Abstract on page 1, which states: "for low-volume disease (LVD) patients; median was not reached (NR; 95% CI, 69.5-NR) and 83.4 mo (95% CI, 61.8-NR) (HR: 1.02 [95% CI, 0.67-1.55]; p = 0.9)". Table 2 on page 4 provides "Survival data... by treatment arm and metastatic burden" including a column for "LVD". Table 1 on page 3 also includes a row for "Low-volume disease (%)".
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
